understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to move selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+) to complete each level. If multiple goals exist, all must be occupied simultaneously to win, but I never managed to switch control to another selectable piece or reach a goal, so the exact win condition was not fully verified.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece 3 pixels per step in the chosen direction. Pushable objects (blocks) can be pushed if adjacent. Walls block movement. CLICK is meant to switch control to another selectable at the specified pixel coordinate, but in this session it never succeeded—either due to misalignment, the target being blocked, or incorrect coordinate usage. The steps budget is limited per level, and running out causes failure.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to move selectable pieces onto goal tiles (+) to complete each level. If multiple goals exist, all must be occupied simultaneously to win, but I never managed to switch control to another selectable piece or reach a goal, so the exact win condition was not fully verified.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the currently selected piece 3 pixels per step in the chosen direction. Pushable objects (blocks) can be pushed if adjacent. Walls block movement. CLICK is meant to switch control to another selectable at the specified pixel coordinate, but in this session it never succeeded—either due to misalignment, the target being blocked, or incorrect coordinate usage. The steps budget is limited per level, and running out causes failure.
